channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Geopolitical news headlines from around the world

item.title: 🇷🇺 Putin Hails Test of New Nuclear-Capable ICBM, Calls It World's Most Powerful
item.description: Russian President Vladimir Putin announced the test of a new intercontinental ballistic missile, claiming it is the world's most powerful, as Russia continues its nuclear saber-rattling amid the Ukraine war and tensions with the West.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US Senate Confirms Kevin Warsh to Federal Reserve Board, Set to Replace Powell as Chair
item.description: The Senate confirmed Trump's pick Kevin Warsh to the Federal Reserve Board, clearing the way for him to take over as Fed chair from Jerome Powell later this week in a significant shift for US monetary policy.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇨🇳 Trump Rejects Iran Peace Plan as 'Garbage' Before Heading to China
item.description: President Trump dismissed an Iran peace proposal before departing for China, where he is expected to seek President Xi Jinping's help in ending the conflict given the lack of progress on diplomatic efforts.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇨🇳 California Mayor Resigns, Will Plead Guilty to Acting as Chinese Agent
item.description: Eileen Wang, mayor of Arcadia, California, resigned and agreed to plead guilty to charges of acting as an illegal agent of the Chinese government while serving in public office.

item.title: 🇺🇸💰 US Finalizes $35.5 Billion in Refunds for Illegal Trump Tariffs
item.description: US Customs and Border Protection has received 126,237 applications for tariff reimbursements as companies seek refunds for tariffs that were ruled illegal, a significant economic correction.

item.title: 🇰🇼 Kuwait Foils Iranian Infiltration Attempt on Bubiyan Island
item.description: Kuwait announced it arrested four men accused of being IRGC operatives attempting to infiltrate Bubiyan Island, marking a significant escalation as Gulf states risk being drawn into the Iran conflict.

item.title: 💰 US Iran War Has Cost $29 Billion, Pentagon Tells Congress
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth testified before Congress that the US military campaign against Iran has cost approximately $29 billion, while lawmakers questioned munitions readiness and escalation options.

item.title: 🇦🇪 UAE Secret Attack on Iran Risks Drawing Gulf States Into War
item.description: The United Arab Emirates conducted a covert attack on Iranian territory, raising fears that Gulf states are being pulled deeper into the conflict as the US-Iran war enters its second month.

item.title: 🇬🇧 UK PM Starmer Defies Calls to Resign After Heavy Election Losses
item.description: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer vowed to continue in office despite growing pressure from Labour Party lawmakers urging him to step down following devastating losses in local elections.

item.title: 🏥 WHO Warns Countries to Prepare for More Hantavirus Cases
item.description: The World Health Organization urged nations to prepare for additional hantavirus cases as a cruise ship-linked outbreak spreads, with Spain confirming new cases bringing the total to 11.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Zelensky ex-chief of staff Yermak charged in corruption probe
item.description: Andriy Yermak, former chief of staff to President Zelensky and Ukraine's lead negotiator with the US, has been named as a suspect in a major money-laundering investigation tied to luxury development near Kyiv. Six people have been charged in the anti-corruption sweep.

item.title: 🇪🇺 Sweden Detains Two Suspects Over Allegedly Aiding High-Tech Shipments to Russia
item.description: Swedish authorities have detained two people on suspicion of violating international sanctions in assisting Russia to procure advanced products, the Swedish Security Service said.

item.title: 🇬🇧 UK Remains 'Resolutely Behind Ukraine,' Minister Tells Kyiv Independent
item.description: Despite political turmoil at home with Prime Minister Starmer under pressure, UK minister confirms Britain remains firmly committed to supporting Ukraine in its fight against Russia.

item.title: ⚔️ Trump Class Battleships Will Be Nuclear Powered
item.description: Equipping the Trump class with nuclear propulsion presents benefits, but also massive challenges, and Navy officials had been pushing back against the idea.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Israel Defense News: Military Operations Update
item.description: Latest developments from Israel's defense sector and military operations in the region.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇨🇳 Trump-Xi Sanctions, Trade Tensions Continue
item.description: Trade and sanctions tensions between the US and China persist as Trump and Xi navigate the geopolitical landscape amid ongoing Iran conflict.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Russian Ship Ursa Major Sank Near Spain, Reports Link to North Korea Reactors
item.description: A Russian cargo vessel sank near Spain, with reports suggesting possible connections to nuclear reactor components destined for North Korea.

item.title: 🌍 Internal Displacements Caused by Violence or Conflict at Record High in 2025
item.description: Global internal displacement from conflict and violence reached unprecedented levels in 2025, highlighting the growing humanitarian crisis worldwide.

item.title: 🇮🇱 UN: Israel Killing at Least One Child Per Week in Occupied West Bank
item.description: United Nations reports indicate that Israeli forces are killing at least one child per week in the occupied West Bank amid ongoing violence.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇨🇳 US-China Arms Sales, Taiwan Tensions Dominate Trump-Xi Summit Prep
item.description: As Trump and Xi prepare for their summit, arms sales to Taiwan and ongoing regional tensions remain key talking points in the bilateral relationship.

item.title: ⚔️ NATO to Cultivate Vetted Counter-Drone Vendor Pool for Nations
item.description: The alliance has established common funding that will allow nations to test counter-UAS systems before making final procurement decisions.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Israel Pushes Ahead With Eichmann-Style Tribunal for October 7 Attackers
item.description: Israeli lawmakers set up a special tribunal and allow for the death penalty for Hamas-led 2023 attackers.

item.title: 🇺🇬 Ugandan President Museveni, 81, Sworn in for New Term After 40 Years
item.description: The five-year term might be his last, with his son and presumptive heir emerging as de facto ruler.

item.title: 🇰🇷 South Korea Cautious on Blaming Iran for Ship Strike Ahead of US-China Summit
item.description: Seoul has footage of the May 4 attack on the HMM Namu but analysts say it is biding its time, hoping 'the dust will settle'.

item.title: 🇨🇺 Trump Says Cuba Seeking Help, Will Hold Talks
item.description: Trump had threatened that Cuba was 'next' after the US military seized the leader of long-time Cuban ally Venezuela earlier this year.
